text:
Created attachment 175820
nodejs 6.8.1

Bump to the latest upstream version. Remove files/patch-node.gyps, as
this patch has been accepted upstream.
    
https://nodejs.org/en/blog/release/v6.8.1/

portlint: OK (-C, spurious warning about possible direct use of "python" command)
testport: OK (poudriere: 11.0-R, 10.[123]-R, 9.3-R, amd64/i386, default options)
